data.description:
## What to do
Update `CLAUDE.md`:

### 1. Add 'ticket delete' row to Quick Reference table
In the Quick Reference table (under ticket operations), add:
| Delete a ticket (human-approved gate) | `.claude/scripts/dso ticket delete <id> --user-approved` |

### 2. Update ticket type/status terminology section
In the "Ticket type terminology" note, add:
- deleted = terminal status; ticket is excluded from ticket list by default; requires --user-approved gate; all children must be deleted first

## Files to modify
- `CLAUDE.md`

## Acceptance criteria
- Quick Reference table has ticket delete entry
- Status terminology section notes deleted as terminal alongside closed
- No implementation details about --user-approved are in CLAUDE.md (discovery mechanism is in ticket-cli-reference.md only)
- No code changes

## Testing mode
UPDATE — documentation only
data.title: Update CLAUDE.md: add ticket delete row and deleted terminal status note
